title: Sort Chest
description: Organize chests instantly with smart sorting, refill, fill, and dump buttons.
body:
Sort Chest is a lightweight inventory management mod that adds quick organization buttons directly to chest-style container screens.

With one click, you can sort a container, refill matching items, fill the container from your inventory, or dump items back into your inventory.

The mod is designed to be simple, fast, and useful without changing the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

Features

- Sort containers with one click
- Smart category-based sorting
- Sort by Category, Name, Mod, Count, or Tags
- Refill matching items from your inventory into the container
- Fill containers from your inventory
- Dump container items back into your inventory
- Small sort mode button next to Sort
- Hover tooltip explaining each sort mode
- Instant sorting in singleplayer
- Server-safe click mode for multiplayer
- Works with vanilla and modded items
- Includes in-game mod menu logo and metadata

Sort Modes

C Category  
A  Name  
M Mod  
(#) Count  
T Tags  

Category sorting groups items in a logical way, keeping blocks, natural items, materials, tools, weapons, armor, food, potions, redstone, and miscellaneous items organized together.

Modded items are supported when possible through item tags, registry names, and item information.

Multiplayer

Sort Chest is a client-side mod. It must be installed on the player’s client to show the sorting buttons.

It does not need to be installed on multiplayer servers. On servers, the mod uses normal inventory click simulation instead of directly editing inventory data.

**Dependency

Sort Chest requires Architectury API.**
